name: wildfire-exposure-eo alt AOI — Serra da Estrela

properties.name: Serra da Estrela (Manteigas / Covilhã / Guarda)
properties.description: Alternative pilot AOI centered on the August 2022 Serra da Estrela fire — Portugal's largest single fire in 50 years, ~25,000 ha burned, primarily inside the Parque Natural da Serra da Estrela. Spans Manteigas, Covilhã, Guarda and Celorico da Beira municipalities.
properties.rationale: Strong recent burn signal (2022), high-quality Copernicus EMS reference perimeters (EMSR618), iconic case study, abundant ICNF Áreas Ardidas history, dense forest fuel.
properties.source: Alternative for PRE_DEV_CHECKLIST.md item D — see docs/aoi_rationale.md.
